summary: Quarterly planning session covering Q2 deliverables, architectural decisions, and team learnings from the past quarter.

actionItems.description: Migrate auth service to new OAuth provider
Write data migration scripts and run in staging
Set up new CI pipeline for monorepo
Update deployment scripts for new infrastructure
Conduct user interviews for new dashboard feature
Review security audit findings and prepare remediation plan
Update API rate limiting configuration for new tier

decisions: Standardize on PostgreSQL for all new services
Adopt trunk-based development starting next sprint
Implement feature flags for all new releases
Require code review from two approvers for security-sensitive changes
Deprecate legacy REST v1 API by end of Q2
Move to biweekly releases instead of weekly
learnings: Database connection pooling is critical at scale
Feature flags reduced rollback rate by 60%
Migration to TypeScript strict mode caught 23 bugs before production
Pair programming on complex migrations reduces errors significantly
Automated canary deployments saved us twice last quarter
New monitoring dashboard reduced mean time to detection by 40%
Onboarding completion correlates strongly with first-week retention

filteredTrivial: Schedule a meeting to follow up on infrastructure changes
Touch base about the budget next week

filteredDuplicates.decisions: Standardize on PostgreSQL for all new services forward (near-dupe)
filteredDuplicates.learnings: Database connection pooling is critical at scale today (near-dupe)
